data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Search and filter by custom fields', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for searching and filtering by custom fields, but there is no concrete evidence of API endpoints or functionality that supports this requirement. Specifically, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the ability to search or filter by the custom fields defined in the use case.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality for searching and filtering by custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement API for searching and filtering by custom fields
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows searching and filtering by custom fields as defined in the use case.
